action.reasoning: Observation: The 6.0625% validation-LSTM blend scored just below the current best 6.075% blend by ~6e-8 AUC, while 6.1% and higher were also lower. Analysis: The peak is extremely narrow around 6.075%; since 6.0625 is slightly low and 6.1 is also lower, a midpoint probe just above the best is the most plausible remaining checkpoint-only improvement. Decision: create and evaluate a 6.08125% validation-LSTM / 93.91875% combined-GRU blend, preserving the current best checkpoint for final fallback.
